text: Once a person asked Allah's Messenger (&) (%) about the night prayer. Allah's Apostle (&) replied, “The night prayer is offered as two Rakat followed by two Rakiat and so on and if anyone is afraid of the approaching dawn (Fair prayer) he should pray one Rakah and this will be a Wit for all the Rakat which he has prayed before.” Reference . Sahih al-Bukhari 990
